Class SpringAiRetryProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.retry.autoconfigure.SpringAiRetryProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.retry") public class SpringAiRetryProperties extends Object
Properties for AI Retry.
Author:
Christian Tzolov
